---
title: "Applied Remote Sensing Engineering"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This section summarizes my production-oriented remote sensing engineering
experience, including satellite data preprocessing, fire monitoring
workflows, agricultural monitoring products, and crop-yield estimation
modules.

::: {.callout-note}
This page uses public-safe descriptions only. Internal source code,
client information, server paths, interface addresses, non-public system
screenshots, contract information, and non-public data are not disclosed.
:::

## Satellite Data Preprocessing and L1-to-L2 Product Generation

**Objective**

- Support automated generation of operational remote sensing products
  from satellite imagery.

**Satellite Data**

- GaoFen-series GF-1 / GF-2 / GF-6
- AQUA satellite
- [To be added]

**Technical Workflow**

- Python-based preprocessing algorithms
- Radiometric calibration
- Atmospheric correction
- Geometric correction
- Image fusion
- Automated batch L1-to-L2 product generation

**My Contribution**

[To be added by Youbin]

**Public-safe Description**

This work focuses on algorithm development and testing for
production-oriented remote sensing workflows. Detailed implementation
logic, internal code, private paths, and non-public product examples are
not disclosed.

**Figures / Materials to be Added**

- [Add generic preprocessing workflow diagram]
- [Add non-sensitive sample product illustration]

---

## Operational Fire Monitoring Workflow

**Objective**

- Support operational fire monitoring through remote sensing product
  generation and workflow testing.

**Data and Products**

- MODIS workflow components
- Daily surface-temperature inversion products
- Time-series compositing products
- Thematic-map products

**Workflow**

- Assisted in MODIS workflow development
- Supported daily surface-temperature inversion
- Supported time-series compositing
- Supported thematic-map production
- Supported B/S module development and testing

**My Contribution**

[To be added by Youbin]

**Public-safe Description**

This section describes public-safe workflow experience in operational
remote sensing product generation. It does not include internal system
screenshots, client names, server addresses, or proprietary code.

**Figures / Materials to be Added**

- [Add fire monitoring workflow diagram]
- [Add non-sensitive thematic product example]

---

## Agricultural Monitoring and Crop Growth Assessment

**Objective**

- Support agricultural monitoring and crop-growth assessment using
  multi-source satellite data.

**Satellite Data**

- FY-3D / FY-3E / FY-3F
- FY-4B
- [To be added]

**Products**

- Vegetation index inversion products
- Crop-growth assessment products
- Automated workflow outputs

**My Contribution**

[To be added by Youbin]

**Figures / Materials to be Added**

- [Add agricultural monitoring workflow]
- [Add vegetation index product example]

---

## Crop Yield Estimation Module

**Objective**

- Develop a crop-yield estimation module for production forecasting.

**Method**

- [To be added]

**Input Data**

- [To be added]

**Output Products**

- [To be added]

**My Contribution**

[To be added by Youbin]

**Figures / Materials to be Added**

- [Add module workflow]
- [Add yield estimation product example]
